mapper.select: SELECT A.BIZ_ID ,CASE B.MA01_1 WHEN 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS MA01_1 ,MA01_6 AS CODE ,B.RT30_1 ,BIZ_NM AS NAME ,CASE WHEN C.MA06_1 IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '0' END M_FLAG FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM MMA070TB WHERE MA06_1='M') C ON (C.MA07_1=B.MA01_6) WHERE A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_8='S' AND A.BIZ_ID = #{RS20_1}
SELECT B.RT31_1 ,B.MA01_2 FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B WHERE A.BIZ_ID=B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_6= #{CODE}
SELECT B.RS31_1 ,C.RS32_1 ,B.RS31_4 FROM BRT3B0TB A ,BRS310TB B ,BRS320TB C WHERE RT31_1= #{RT31_1} --Param AND A.RS32_1=B.RS31_3 AND A.RS31_1=B.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_1=C.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_3=C.RS32_1
SELECT RS31_1 ,RS32_1 ,TO_CHAR(RS34_1, 'FM90.99999999') AS RS34_1 FROM BRS340TB WHERE RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} --Param AND RS32_1 = #{RS32_1} --Param AND RS34_2 =1

SELECT A.RS33_1 AS SEQ ,A.RS33_3 AS NAME ,B.RS3A_1 AS INPUT ,A.RS33_2 AS TYPE ,A.RS31_1 || '::' || A.RS33_1 AS RULE FROM BRS330TB A ,BRS3A0TB B ,BRS360TB C WHERE A.RS31_1 = B.RS31_1 AND A.RS32_1 = B.RS32_1 AND A.RS33_1 = B.RS33_1 AND B.RS31_1 = C.RS31_1 AND B.RS32_1 = C.RS32_1 AND B.RS34_1 = C.RS34_1 AND B.RS35_1 = C.RS35_1 AND B.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} --Param RS31_1 AND B.RS32_1 = #{RS32_1} --Param RS32_1 AND B.RS34_1 = #{RS34_1} --Param RS34_1 AND C.RS36_1 = 2 AND C.RS36_2 = #{RS36_2} ORDER BY A.RS33_1
SELECT B.MA01_6 AS CODE ,B.MA01_2 AS RS31_1 FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B WHERE A.BIZ_ID=B.RT30_1 AND B.RT30_1=#{RS20_1}

SELECT B.RS31_1 ,C.RS32_1 ,RS31_3 ,RS31_T ,RS31_U ,RS31_Y AS UPD_DT ,RS31_Z ,GET_USER_NAME(RS31_Z) AS UPD_NM ,RS32_2 ,RS32_3 ,RS32_4 FROM BRT3B0TB A ,BRS310TB B ,BRS320TB C WHERE RT31_1=(SELECT B.RT31_1 FROM C_BIZ X ,MMA010TB Y WHERE X.BIZ_ID=Y.RT30_1 AND Y.MA01_6= (SELECT MA01_6 FROM C_BIZ T ,MMA010TB U LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM MMA070TB WHERE MA06_1='M') V ON (V.MA07_1=U.MA01_6) WHERE T.BIZ_ID = U.RT30_1 AND U.MA01_8='S' AND T.BIZ_ID = #{RS20_1}) ) AND A.RS32_1=B.RS31_3 AND A.RS31_1=B.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_1=C.RS31_1 AND B.RS31_3=C.RS32_1

SELECT SN_PRGRS_CCD, IS_UPD, DECODE(IS_UPD, 'X', '0', DEPLOY_DT) AS DEPLOY_DT ,NVL(SN_PRGRS_CCD_NM, '미결재') AS SN_PRGRS_CCD_NM FROM ( SELECT NVL(A.SN_PRGRS_CCD,'X') AS SN_PRGRS_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('S041',A.SN_PRGRS_CCD) AS SN_PRGRS_CCD_NM ,CASE WHEN D.RS32_1=C.RS31_3 AND D.RS34_2 = 1 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS IS_UPD ,CASE WHEN NVL(A.SN_PRGRS_CCD,'9') = '9' AND D.RS32_1=C.RS31_6 AND D.RS34_U = 2 THEN SUBSTR(C.RS31_Y,1,8) ELSE '0' END AS DEPLOY_DT FROM NIC58B A ,BRS320TB B ,BRS310TB C ,BRS340TB D WHERE B.RS32_2 = DECODE(#{RULE_ID}, '0000', 'CTR기준금액', #{RULE_ID}) AND B.RS31_1 = C.RS31_1 AND C.RS31_1 = D.RS31_1 AND D.RS32_1 = A.RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER(+) AND D.RS34_1 = A.RULE_UPD_MIN_VER(+) AND A.RULE_ID(+) = REPLACE(#{RULE_ID}, '기준DATA_', '') ORDER BY D.RS32_1 DESC ,D.RS34_1 DESC ,A.INST_ID DESC NULLS LAST ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,7,2) AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,'KYC' AS INST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,A.ITEM_NM ,'조회' AS UPD_HIS ,'조회' AS APP_HIS ,NVL(B.RSN_CNTNT, '') AS RSN_CNTNT ,B.SNO ,B.WLR_SQ ,B.REG_DT ,B.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,B.NUM_SQ ,B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' THEN '위험평가등급' WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' THEN '위험평가항목점수' WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA3' THEN '위험평가항목가중치' ELSE '' END AS GYLJ_LINE_GUBUN ,B.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.APP_NO ,A.ORDER_NO ,B.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,B.PRV_APP_NO FROM AML_APPR B ,( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,'' AS CS_TYP_CD ,'' AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.LST_APP_NO AS APP_NO ,'3' AS ORDER_NO --점수 ,( ( SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('A040',RA_MDL_GBN_CD) FROM RA_ITEM WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD ) ||' '|| A.RA_ITEM_NM ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM A UNION ALL SELECT '' AS RA_ITEM_CD ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.LST_WGHT_APP_NO AS APP_NO , '1' AS ORDER_NO --가중치 ,('가중치 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030',A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A UNION ALL SELECT '' AS RA_ITEM_CD , A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.LST_GRD_APP_NO AS APP_NO , '2' AS ORDER_NO -- 등급 ,('등급판정 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030',A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ) A WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('RA1','RA2','RA3') AND B.APP_NO = A.APP_NO AND B.TARGET_ROLE_ID = #{RA_ROLE_ID} AND B.APP_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} ORDER BY B.APP_DT DESC ,B.APP_NO DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,7,2) AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD= 'E' THEN SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,7,2) ELSE '' END AS SN_END_DY_TM ,'KYC' AS INST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,A.ITEM_NM ,'조회' AS UPD_HIS ,'조회' AS APP_HIS ,NVL(B.RSN_CNTNT, '') AS RSN_CNTNT ,B.SNO ,B.WLR_SQ ,B.REG_DT ,B.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,B.NUM_SQ ,B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' THEN '위험평가등급' WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' THEN '위험평가항목점수' WHEN B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA3' THEN '위험평가항목가중치' ELSE '' END AS GYLJ_LINE_GUBUN ,B.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.APP_NO ,A.ORDER_NO ,B.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,B.PRV_APP_NO FROM AML_APPR B ,( SELECT X.RA_ITEM_CD ,'' AS CS_TYP_CD ,'' AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,X.LST_APP_NO AS APP_NO , '3' AS ORDER_NO --점수 ,((SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('A040',RA_MDL_GBN_CD) FROM RA_ITEM WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = X.RA_ITEM_CD) ||' '|| X.RA_ITEM_NM ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM X UNION ALL SELECT '' AS RA_ITEM_CD ,Y.CS_TYP_CD ,Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,Y.LST_WGHT_APP_NO AS APP_NO , '1' AS ORDER_NO --가중치 ,('가중치 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030',Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', Y.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG Y UNION ALL SELECT '' AS RA_ITEM_CD ,Z.CS_TYP_CD ,Z.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,Z.LST_GRD_APP_NO AS APP_NO , '2' AS ORDER_NO -- 등급 ,('등급판정 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030',Z.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', Z.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS ITEM_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG Z ) A WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('RA1','RA2','RA3') AND B.APP_NO = A.APP_NO AND B.APP_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} ORDER BY B.APP_DT DESC ,B.APP_NO DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SN_REQ_DY_TM,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,A.INST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('S041', A.SN_PRGRS_CCD) AS ACT_NAME ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR', 'CTR', 'KYC', C.RS32_2, 'STR', NVL(B.RULE_GB,C.RS32_2)) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR 기준금액', 'CTR', 'KYC', C.RS32_2, 'STR', NVL(B.RULE_DESC, C.RS32_2)) AS RULE_DESC ,'조회' AS UPD_HIS ,'조회' AS APP_HIS ,CASE WHEN A.SN_END_DY_TM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SN_END_DY_TM,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS SN_END_DY_TM ,CASE WHEN A.SN_PRGRS_CCD = '9' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(D.RS31_Y,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS DEPLOY_DT ,A.INST_ID ,C.RS31_1 ,C.RS32_1 ,C.RS32_2 ,C.RS32_3 ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR', 'CTR기준금액', A.RULE_ID) AS RULE_ID ,D.RS20_1 ,F.WORK_ID ,A.RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER AS MAJ_A ,A.RULE_UPD_MIN_VER AS MIN_A ,A.RULE_LST_MAJ_VER AS MAJ_B ,A.RULE_LST_MIN_VER AS MIN_B ,A.SN_REQ_CMNT FROM NIC58B A ,( SELECT '['||Y.MA01_6||'] '|| X.BIZ_NM AS RULE_GB ,X.BIZ_DESC AS RULE_DESC ,Y.MA01_6 ,Y.RT30_1 FROM C_BIZ X ,MMA010TB Y ,C_PKG_BIZ_MAP Z WHERE X.BIZ_ID = Y.RT30_1 AND X.BIZ_ID = Z.BIZ_ID AND Z.PKG_ID = '6' ) B ,( SELECT X.INST_ID ,X.WORK_ID ,X.ACT_NAME ,X.ACT_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY X WHERE ( (X.PERSON_YN='Y' AND X.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR ( X.PERSON_YN='N' AND X.PARTICIPANT_ID IN ( SELECT U.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T ,C_USER U WHERE T.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND T.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND U.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} ) ) ) ) F ,BRS320TB C ,BRS310TB D ,BRS340TB E WHERE A.RULE_ID = B.MA01_6(+) AND A.INST_ID = F.INST_ID AND (DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'STR', '기준DATA_'||A.RULE_ID, 'KYC', A.RULE_ID, 'CTR기준금액') = C.RS32_2 OR A.RULE_ID = TO_CHAR(C.RS31_1)) AND C.RS31_1 = D.RS31_1 AND C.RS32_1 = A.RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER AND D.RS31_1 = E.RS31_1 AND E.RS32_1 = A.RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER AND E.RS34_1 = A.RULE_UPD_MIN_VER
AND A.INST_CCD IN ('STR', 'CTR')
AND SUBSTR(A.SN_REQ_DY_TM,1,8) BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} AND A.SN_PRGRS_CCD ='1' ORDER BY A.INST_ID DESC

choose.otherwise: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SN_REQ_DY_TM,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,A.INST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('S041', A.SN_PRGRS_CCD) AS ACT_NAME ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR', '[CTR01]CTR대상추출', 'STR', B.RULE_GB) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR', 'CTR대상추출', 'STR', B.RULE_DESC) AS RULE_DESC ,'조회' AS UPD_HIS ,'조회' AS APP_HIS ,CASE WHEN A.SN_END_DY_TM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SN_END_DY_TM,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS SN_END_DY_TM ,CASE WHEN A.SN_PRGRS_CCD = '9' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.LST_APPL_DTTM,1,8),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS DEPLOY_DT ,A.INST_ID ,DECODE(A.INST_CCD, 'CTR', 'CTR01', A.RULE_ID) AS RULE_ID FROM NIC58B A INNER JOIN ( SELECT X.SCNR_ID , X.SCNR_NM AS RULE_DESC , '[' || X.SCNR_ID || ']' || X.SCNR_NM AS RULE_GB , X.LST_APPL_DTTM FROM TMS_APPL X INNER JOIN TMS_BZDM_MNG Y ON X.BIZ_CD = Y.BIZ_CD AND Y.USE_YN = 'Y' ) B ON A.RULE_ID = B.SCNR_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT X.INST_ID, Z.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE X , WF_WORKLIST Y , WF_ACT Z WHERE X.WORK_ID = Y.WORK_ID AND Y.ACT_ID = Z.ACT_ID ) C ON A.INST_ID = C.INST_ID WHERE 1 = 1

mapper.select: SELECT WORK_ID FROM WF_WORKLIST WHERE INST_ID = #{INST_ID} AND WORK_STATUS_CD IN ('READY','ACTIVE')

SELECT MAX(A.RULE_GB) AS RULE_GB ,MAX(A.RULE_DESC) AS RULE_DESC ,MAX(C.USER_NM) AS USER_NM ,MAX(C.SN_REQ_DY_TM) AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,MAX(C.SN_REQ_CMNT) AS SN_REQ_CMNT ,MAX(C.INST_ID) AS INST_ID ,MAX(B.RS31_1) AS RS31_1 ,MAX(B.RT31_1) AS RT31_1 ,MAX(B.RT32_1) AS RT32_1 ,MAX(B.RS32_3) AS RS32_3 ,MAX(B.RS32_1) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.RS34_1 DESC) AS MAJ_A ,MAX(B.RS34_1) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.RS34_1 DESC) AS MIN_A ,MAX(B.RS32_1) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.RS34_1) AS MAJ_B ,MAX(B.RS34_1) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY B.RS34_1) AS MIN_B FROM ( SELECT DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', X.RULE_GB, 'KYC', X.RULE_GB, 'STR', NVL(Y.RULE_GB, X.RULE_GB)) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', X.RULE_DESC, 'KYC', X.RULE_DESC, 'STR', NVL(Y.RULE_DESC,X.RULE_DESC) ) AS RULE_DESC FROM ( SELECT DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', 'CTR', T.RS32_2) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', 'CTR 기준금액', T.RS32_2) AS RULE_DESC FROM BRS320TB T WHERE T.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) X LEFT JOIN ( SELECT '['||U.MA01_6||'] '|| T.BIZ_NM AS RULE_GB ,T.BIZ_DESC AS RULE_DESC FROM C_BIZ T ,MMA010TB U ,C_PKG_BIZ_MAP V WHERE T.BIZ_ID = U.RT30_1 AND T.BIZ_ID = V.BIZ_ID AND U.RT30_1 = #{RS20_1} --PARAM(RS20_1) AND V.PKG_ID = '6' ) Y ON 1=1 ) A ,( SELECT Y.RS32_1 ,Y.RS34_1 ,Y.RS31_1 ,Z.RT31_1 ,Z.RT32_1 ,W.RS32_3 FROM BRS310TB X ,BRS340TB Y ,BRT3B0TB Z ,BRS320TB W WHERE Y.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} AND Y.RS31_1 = Z.RS31_1 AND X.RS31_1 = Z.RS31_1 AND Y.RS32_1 = Z.RS32_1 AND Y.RS31_1 = W.RS31_1 ) B ,( SELECT (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = X.SN_REQ_P_ENO) AS USER_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SN_REQ_DY_TM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SN_REQ_DY_TM ,SN_REQ_CMNT ,INST_ID ,RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER ,RULE_UPD_MIN_VER ,RULE_LST_MAJ_VER ,RULE_LST_MIN_VER FROM NIC58B X WHERE RULE_ID = DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', '0000', #{RULE_ID}) AND INST_ID = #{INST_ID} ) C WHERE (B.RS32_1,B.RS34_1) IN ( (C.RULE_UPD_MAJ_VER, C.RULE_UPD_MIN_VER) ,(C.RULE_LST_MAJ_VER, C.RULE_LST_MIN_VER) )

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.NUM_SQ ,(SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,7,2)) AS APP_DT_CH ,A.APP_DT ,A.WLR_SQ ,A.REG_DT ,A.SNO ,A.SN_CCD ,A.BRN_CD ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.PRV_APP_NO ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS USER_NM ,#{CS_TYP_CD} AS CS_TYP_CD ,#{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.NUM_SQ ,(SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,7,2)) AS APP_DT ,A.WLR_SQ ,A.REG_DT ,A.SNO ,A.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,A.BRN_CD ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,(SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_ID_NM ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS USER_NM FROM AML_APPR_HIST A WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.RULE_GB ,A.RULE_DESC ,B.MAJ_VER ,B.MIN_VER ,B.LST_MAJ_VER ,B.LST_MIN_VER FROM ( SELECT DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'KYC', X.RULE_GB, 'CTR', X.RULE_GB, 'STR', NVL(Y.RULE_GB, X.RULE_GB)) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'KYC', X.RULE_DESC, 'CTR', X.RULE_DESC, 'STR', NVL(Y.RULE_DESC,X.RULE_DESC)) AS RULE_DESC FROM ( SELECT DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', 'CTR', T.RS32_2) AS RULE_GB ,DECODE(#{INST_CCD}, 'CTR', 'CTR 기준금액', T.RS32_2) AS RULE_DESC FROM BRS320TB T WHERE T.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) X LEFT JOIN ( SELECT '['||B.MA01_6||'] '|| A.BIZ_NM AS RULE_GB ,A.BIZ_DESC AS RULE_DESC FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B ,C_PKG_BIZ_MAP C WHERE A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND A.BIZ_ID = C.BIZ_ID AND B.RT30_1 = #{RS20_1} --PARAM(RS20_1) AND C.PKG_ID = '6' ) Y ON 1=1 ) A , ( SELECT X.* FROM ( SELECT T.RS32_1 AS MAJ_VER ,T.RS34_1 AS MIN_VER ,MAX(DECODE(T.RS34_U,2,T.RS32_1)) OVER () AS LST_MAJ_VER ,MAX(DECODE(T.RS34_U,2,T.RS34_1)) OVER () AS LST_MIN_VER FROM BRS340TB T WHERE T.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} ORDER BY T.RS32_1 DESC, T.RS34_1 DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) B

SELECT B.MA01_6 --룰ID ,(SELECT BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ WHERE BIZ_ID=C.PAR_BIZ_ID) AS RULE_LCM --대분류(룰특성) ,A.BIZ_NM --의심거래유형 FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B ,C_PKG_BIZ_MAP C WHERE A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND A.BIZ_ID = C.BIZ_ID AND B.RT30_1 = #{RS20_1} --PARAM(RS20_1) AND C.PKG_ID = '6'

SELECT A.MA20_2 AS WORK_DT --추출기준일 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '1' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS FROM_DT ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '2' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS TO_DT ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '3' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS S_NM --시나리오명 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '4' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('M006', MA21_3) ELSE '' END) AS INDV_CORP_NM --고객구분 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '4' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS INDV_CORP_CD --고객구분 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '5' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('A031', MA21_3) ELSE '' END) AS W_PRD --작업주기 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '6' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS CRIT_VAL1 --임계치 ,MAX(CASE WHEN MA21_1 = '7' THEN MA21_3 ELSE '' END) AS CRIT_VAL2 FROM MMA200TB A ,MMA210TB B WHERE A.MA20_1 = B.MA20_1 AND A.MA20_1 =#{MA01_6} AND A.MA20_2 = B.MA20_2 GROUP BY A.MA20_1, A.MA20_2 ORDER BY A.MA20_2 DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BRS340TB SET RS34_2 = 1 WHERE (RS31_1, RS32_1, RS34_1) IN ( SELECT A.RS43_1 ,A.RS43_C ,B.RS44_1 FROM BRS430TB A ,( SELECT RS43_1 ,MAX(RS44_1) RS44_1 FROM BRS440TB WHERE RS43_1 = #{RULE_NO} GROUP BY RS43_1 ) B WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 )
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,B.RA_ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR_DTL A ,RA_ITEM B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,B.RA_ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR_DTL A ,RA_ITEM B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR A WHERE A.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )

SELECT A.APP_NO, ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_VAL,NULL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_VAL,NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(GET_CODE_NAME(#{REFF_COMN_CD}, A.RA_ITEM_VAL),B.RA_ITEM_VAL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '변경' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR = B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '유지' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END GUBUN ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,NVL(B.ABS_HRSK_YN,'') AS BEFOR_ABS_HRSK_YN FROM ( SELECT * FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL WHERE APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT APP_NO ,RA_ITEM_VAL ,RA_ITEM_SCR ,ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL WHERE APP_NO IN (SELECT NVL(MAX(A.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL A LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND B.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}) )B ON A.RA_ITEM_VAL = B.RA_ITEM_VAL
SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,A.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RA_GRD_CD) RA_GRD_CD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR_DTL A WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,A.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RA_GRD_CD) RA_GRD_CD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR_DTL A WHERE A.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(X.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR_DTL X WHERE X.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} )

SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.REFF_COMN_CD ,B.APP_NO ,B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,B.NUM_SQ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = B.HNDL_P_ENO) AS USER_NM ,(SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4)||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,5,2)||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,7,2)) AS APP_DT ,B.WLR_SQ ,B.SNO ,B.SN_CCD ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미결재' ELSE (GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD)) END AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT ,B.BRN_CD ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,B.TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM RA_ITEM A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.LST_APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE B.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,B.SCNR_ID ,B.SCNR_NM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO AS USER_ID ,D.USER_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REQ_DTTM ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,B.SCNR_CCD FROM AML_APPR A INNER JOIN TMS_APPL B ON A.APP_NO = B.LST_APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_REQ C ON B.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID INNER JOIN C_USER D ON A.HNDL_P_ENO = D.USER_ID WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}
SELECT AML_APPR_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS NUM_SQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,C.SCNR_NM ,B.APP_NO ,B.CS_CCD ,B.SET_VAL_CD ,B.SET_VAL_NM ,B.SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP A INNER JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_REQ C ON A.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} AND A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY B.CS_CCD ASC ,B.SET_VAL_CD ASC

WITH TMP AS ( SELECT APP_NO AS APP_NO2 FROM ( SELECT APP_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(APP_NO) DESC ) AS RN FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP WHERE SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ) WHERE RN =2 ) SELECT A.SCNR_ID ,C.SCNR_NM ,B.APP_NO ,B.CS_CCD ,B.SET_VAL_CD ,B.SET_VAL_NM ,B.SET_VAL FROM TMS_SET_VAL_APP A INNER JOIN TMS_SET_VAL_APP_DTL B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_REQ C ON A.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID WHERE A.APP_NO = (select app_no2 from tmp ) AND A.SCNR_ID = #{SCNR_ID} ORDER BY B.CS_CCD ASC ,B.SET_VAL_CD ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ ASC) AS ROW_NUM ,A.SNO ,A.SN_CCD ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,RSN_CNTNT ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,B.USER_NM FROM AML_APPR_HIST A INNER JOIN C_USER B ON A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.APP_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APP_DT ,B.SCNR_ID ,B.SCNR_CCD ,A.SN_CCD ,'[' || B.SCNR_ID || ']' || B.SCNR_NM AS CATEGORY ,'조회' AS CHANGE_HISTORY ,'조회' AS APPROVAL_HISTORY ,B.SCNR_NM ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN A.APP_DT END AS SN_END_DY_TM FROM AML_APPR A INNER JOIN TMS_APPL B ON A.APP_NO = B.LST_APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_REQ C ON B.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('TMS1', 'TMS2') AND A.APP_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} ORDER BY A.APP_DT DESC
